---
title: "Dajedaje"
author: pino
affiliation: Sapienza
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: ao   
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme: superhero
    self-contained: true  
    bibliography: biblio.bib
    reference-location: margin
    citation-location: margin
---
# Presentation

Daje, dajino, dajone. [@ggplot]

All'improvviso, Capena
![Capena](Dajino/img-2.jpg)
[Link to something] <https://iris.unive.it/handle/10278/3679958>

## Mini dajino
Poffarbacco $$X = V + E$$

For further [UNtitled](UNtitled.html)

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
Daje
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
Megadaje
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
Superdaje
:::

:::

### Micro dajino


#### Nano dajino
